title: Permissions & Privilege
html:
Permissions & Privilege

Contents

  • Read / change permissions
  • Special bits — SUID / SGID / sticky
  • umask
  • sudo / su
  • ACLs (POSIX getfacl/setfacl)
  • Capabilities (finer than SUID)

Read / change permissions

CommandDescription
 
ls -l file
view perms (rwxrwxrwx)
stat file
full perm/owner/timestamp info
chmod 755 file
rwx for owner, rx for group+other
chmod 600 ~/.ssh/id_rsa
private key perms (required)
chmod u+x script.sh
add execute for owner (symbolic)
chmod -R go-rwx dir/
recursively strip group+other
chown user:group file
change owner+group
chown -R www-data: /var/www
recursive owner change
chgrp wheel file
group only

Special bits — SUID / SGID / sticky

SUID (4xxx): run as file owner. SGID (2xxx) on dir: new files inherit group. Sticky (1xxx) on dir: only owner can delete their files (e.g. /tmp).

CommandDescription
 
chmod u+s /usr/local/bin/foo
set SUID
chmod g+s shared/
set SGID on dir
chmod +t /shared/tmp
sticky bit
find / -perm -4000 2>/dev/null
all SUID binaries (privesc enum)
find / -perm -2000 2>/dev/null
all SGID binaries

umask

CommandDescription
 
umask
current umask (e.g. 0022)
umask 027
new files: 640 / new dirs: 750

sudo / su

CommandDescription
 
sudo -l
list what current user can sudo
sudo -u alice command
run command as alice
sudo -i
interactive login shell as root
sudo -E command
preserve environment
su - bob
switch user with their env
visudo
edit sudoers safely

ACLs (POSIX getfacl/setfacl)

CommandDescription
 
getfacl file
show ACL
setfacl -m u:alice:rw file
grant alice rw
setfacl -x u:alice file
remove alice's entry
setfacl -b file
clear all ACLs

Capabilities (finer than SUID)

CommandDescription
 
getcap -r / 2>/dev/null
all files with capabilities
setcap cap_net_bind_service=+ep ./mybin
let mybin bind <1024 w/o root
getcap ./mybin
inspect
